semanticCore: Approaching, drawing near, closing, hurry, or terminal time
quranicRelevance: The approaching Day of Judgment (Azifah - 'azifati al-azifatu', 'yawma al-azifati').

keyDerivations.meaning: To approach, draw near, be imminent, close in, or hasten
The approaching event, imminent calamity, or Name of the Day of Judgment

figurativeOrRareUsages: أَزِفَتِ الْآزِفَةُ (53:57): The approaching Day has drawn near (the imminence of cosmic reset).
discardedNoise: Traditional hurry descriptors in camel riding.
summaryEn: The root represents immediate proximity, using 'Azifah' as an eschatological name to stress that the Day of Judgment is close, urgent, and inevitable.
summaryAr: يمثل هذا الجذر اقتراب الشيء وحينه وضيق وقته، مستخدماً وصف الآزفة كاسم ليوم القيامة للتنبيه على قرب ميعادها الحاسم وضيق فرصة التدارك.
rawText: أَزِفَ 1 , aor. ﹷ, inf. n. أَزَفٌ (S, Msb, K) and أُزُوفٌ, (Msb, K,) It (departure) was, or became, or drew, near: (S, Msb, K:) and in like manner, a time. (TA.) Hence, in the Kur [liii. 58], أَزِفَتِ الآزِفَةُ The resurrection draweth near. (S, (Msb.) === He (a man) hastened, or was quick: (S, K:) or he drew near, and hastened, or was quick. (A, TA.) الآزِفَةُ The resurrection: so in the Kur liii. 58, (S, Msb,) and xl. 18: (Bd:) or in the latter place it means the near event, or case, of being on the brink of the fire [of Hell]: or, as some say, death. (Bd.) آزَفَنى 4 He (a man, TA) incited me, or urged me, to hasten, or be quick: (K, TA:) it is of the measure أَفْعَلَنِى. (TA.) آزِفٌ , applied to a man, Hastening, or quick: (S, TA:) and endeavouring to hasten, or be quick. (TA.) تآزفوا 6 They drew near together, one to another. (IF, K.) تَأَزُّفٌ 5 The stepping with contracted steps. (K.) But see خَطْوٌ مُتَآزِفٌ, below. (TA.) مُتَآزِفٌ , of the measure مُتَفَاعِلٌ, applied to a man, (TA,) Short; (S, A, K;) as being contracted in make; (A, TA;) having his several parts near together. (S, K.) [In the CK it is written مُتَأزِّف, in this sense and others, following.] === A strait, or narrow, place. (O, L, K.) === A contracted stepping: you say, خَطْوٌ مُتَآزِفٌ: so in the O and L. (TA.) === ‡ A man (Sgh, TA) evil in disposition; narrow-minded: (Sgh, K, TA:) weak; cowardly. (TA.)
